data.content: Implemented error-exit retry with different agent in take-loop. Key changes: (1) Shared handleTakeIterationClose function consolidates close handling across initial and take-loop child handlers. (2) On non-zero exit, rolls back action state via enforceQueueTerminalInvariant, then tries buildNextTakePrompt with strict agent exclusion (selectFromPoolStrict). If no alternative agent exists, terminates. (3) Per-iteration outcome stats persisted to .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.json with success classification (next-queue, same-queue, or terminal state = success). (4) nextQueueStateForStep added to workflows.ts for deriving the expected next state. (5) 20 tests covering retry, no-alternative stop, success/failure classification, rollback-before-retry, and take-loop child parity.
